meta.title: U.S. Mechanics Lien Deadlines — Open Dataset
meta.description: Statutory mechanics/construction lien deadlines by state and role, with verbatim statute citations. Informational reference only — NOT legal advice.
meta.disclaimer: This dataset is provided for general informational purposes only and does NOT constitute legal advice. Lien deadlines depend on facts (project type, your tier, notices recorded by others, weekends/holidays, contract terms) and statutes change. Many exceptions and tolling rules apply. Always verify against the current statute and consult a licensed attorney in the relevant state before relying on any date. No attorney-client relationship is created by use of this dataset.
meta.license: CC BY 4.0 — attribution: lien-deadlines open dataset

states.name: California
states.statute: California Civil Code §8000 et seq. (private works)

deadlines.name: Preliminary Notice
deadlines.notes: A late notice only reaches back 20 days from when it is served.

deadlines.name: Record Claim of Lien
deadlines.trigger: completion of the work of improvement

conditional.label: if the owner records a Notice of Completion/Cessation

deadlines.notes: 90 days after completion. If the owner records a Notice of Completion or Cessation, a direct contractor has only 60 days.

deadlines.name: Foreclosure Lawsuit
deadlines.notes: This period cannot be tolled or extended.

deadlines.name: Preliminary Notice
deadlines.servedOn: owner, prime contractor, and construction lender (if any)
deadlines.notes: A late notice only reaches back 20 days from when it is served.

deadlines.name: Record Claim of Lien
deadlines.trigger: completion of the work of improvement

conditional.label: if the owner records a Notice of Completion/Cessation

deadlines.notes: 90 days after completion. If the owner records a Notice of Completion or Cessation, a subcontractor has only 30 days.

deadlines.name: Foreclosure Lawsuit
deadlines.notes: This period cannot be tolled or extended.

states.name: Texas
states.note: Deadlines below reflect the rules for prime contracts entered into on or after January 1, 2022.

deadlines.name: File Lien Affidavit
deadlines.trigger: month of last labor or materials furnished
deadlines.notes: Original contractors are not required to send monthly pre-lien notices; the affidavit must still be recorded by this deadline.

deadlines.name: Foreclosure Lawsuit
deadlines.trigger: last day a claimant could file the lien affidavit
deadlines.notes: Reduced from 2 years to 1 year for projects on or after 2022-01-01. The period may be extended to 2 years only by written agreement with the current owner.

deadlines.name: Monthly Pre-Lien Notice (Fund-Trapping Notice)
deadlines.trigger: each month unpaid labor or materials furnished
deadlines.notes: The statute contemplates a separate notice for each unpaid month; the notice allows the owner to trap funds otherwise owed to the general contractor.

deadlines.name: File Lien Affidavit
deadlines.trigger: month of last labor or materials furnished
deadlines.notes: Commercial: 15th day of the 4th calendar month. Residential: 15th day of the 3rd calendar month.

deadlines.name: Foreclosure Lawsuit
deadlines.trigger: last day a claimant could file the lien affidavit
deadlines.notes: Reduced from 2 years to 1 year for projects on or after 2022-01-01.

deadlines.name: Record Claim of Lien
deadlines.trigger: final furnishing of labor or materials
deadlines.notes: Warranty, punch-list, or remedial work does NOT extend the 90-day clock.

deadlines.name: Foreclosure Lawsuit
deadlines.notes: A Notice of Contest of Lien recorded by the owner can shorten this period to 60 days.

deadlines.name: Notice to Owner (NTO)
deadlines.notes: Service is required within 45 days of first furnishing and before the owner makes final payment; failure to serve the NTO forfeits lien rights.

deadlines.name: Record Claim of Lien
deadlines.trigger: final furnishing of labor or materials
deadlines.notes: Warranty, punch-list, or remedial work does NOT extend the 90-day clock.

deadlines.name: Foreclosure Lawsuit
deadlines.notes: A Notice of Contest of Lien recorded by the owner can shorten this period to 60 days.
